title: Terrebonne Parish; charter commission; plan of government
doc_html: NOTE: Former §1392, dealing with the charter commission and plan of government for Terrebonne Parish, was removed from the Louisiana Revised Statutes of 1950 pursuant to Acts 2014, No. 158, §4 but remains in effect as a Local and Special Act; see Acts 1979, No. 341 for content.
doc_text:
NOTE:  Former §1392, dealing with the charter commission and plan
of government for Terrebonne Parish, was removed from the Louisiana
Revised Statutes of 1950 pursuant to Acts 2014, No. 158, §4 but
remains in effect as a Local and Special Act; see Acts 1979, No. 341
for content.
